India Today Top Engineering Colleges17 (2025)16 (2024)
The Week Best Technical Universities India21 (2023)--
The Week Top Engineering Colleges India15 (2025)18 (2024)

MODE OF ADMISSION

  • Candidates must appear for the JEE (Main) exam and either secure at least 75% marks (65% for SC/ST/PwD) in Class XII or be within the category-wise top 20 percentile in their respective Class XII board examination. For more details, refer to the JEE Main Performance Criteria in Class XII.
  • Admissions are based on the rank obtained in JEE (Main) through JoSAA Counselling and CSAB Special Round.
  • Admissions for BC-I/BC-II category candidates from Jharkhand who passed their Class 12 from Jharkhand state are based on the rank obtained in JEE (Main) and are conducted through institutional counselling.

Sister Institute

BIT Patna

COURSES OFFERED

Please choose the course.

B.E./B.Tech. - 4 Years

  • Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning
  • Biotechnology
  • Chemical Engineering
  • Civil Engineering
  • Computer Science and Engineering
  • Electrical and Electronics Engineering
  • Electronics and Communication Engineering
  • Food Engineering and Technology
  • Mechanical Engineering
  • Production and Industrial Engineering

B.Arch. - 5 Years

  • Architecture

Integrated M.Sc. - 5 Years

  • Mathematics and Computing
  • Physics
  • Quantitative Economics and Data Science

Institute Fee

ParticularsAmount
Caution Money (One-Time, Refundable)₹10,000
One-Time Fees₹85,000
Tuition Fee (per Semester)₹1,53,000 (B.Tech.)
₹1,56,000 (B.Arch.)
₹60,000 (Int. M.Sc)
Other Fees (per Semester)₹18,500 (B.Tech.)
₹19,000 (B.Arch.)
₹12,000 (Int. M.Sc)
Total₹2,66,500 (B.Tech.)
₹2,70,000 (B.Arch.)
₹1,67,000 (Int. M.Sc)

Hostel Fee

ParticularsAmount
Hostel Caution Money (One-Time, Refundable)₹5,000
Hostel Charges (per Semester)₹21,000
Mess Advance (per Semester)₹30,000
Total₹56,000
